# Shubham Kumar - Full Content

## About
Backend engineer specializing in system design, scalable architectures, and building at scale. Focused on Node.js, TypeScript, distributed systems, and cloud infrastructure.

## Experience
Senior Backend Engineer with expertise in building high-throughput systems, microservices architectures, and real-time data pipelines. Proficient in Node.js, TypeScript, Python, Go, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS.

## Skills
- Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Go
- Backend: Node.js, Express, Fastify, NestJS
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, DynamoDB
- Infrastructure: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform
- Messaging: Kafka, RabbitMQ, Redis Streams
- Monitoring: Datadog, Grafana, Prometheus

## Services
- Backend system architecture and development
- API design and implementation
- Database design and optimization
- Cloud infrastructure setup and management
- Performance optimization and scaling
- Code review and technical consulting

## Blog
All blog posts are available at https://www.shubhkumar.in/blogs. Each post can be accessed at https://www.shubhkumar.in/blogs/{slug}.

For the complete index of all blog posts, visit the blog listing page.
